title: Task Manager
instructions: Is platform par 'GET' aur 'POST' routes ko complete karein.
solution:
app.get('/tasks', (req, res) => res.json(JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('data.json'))));
app.post('/tasks', (req, res) => { const d = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('data.json')); d.push(req.body); fs.writeFileSync('data.json', JSON.stringify(d)); res.json({ok:true}); });
explanation: Isme humne basic GET ke saath POST implement kiya hai. Simple array methods push/filter use kiye gaye hain.

title: User Profile
instructions: Is platform par 'GET' aur 'DELETE' routes ko complete karein.

starterCode.index.html: User Profile

solution:
app.get('/users', (req, res) => res.json(JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('data.json'))));

app.delete('/users/:id', (req, res) => { let d = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync('data.json')); d = d.filter(x => x.id != req.params.id); fs.writeFileSync('data.json', JSON.stringify(d)); res.json({ok:true}); });
explanation: Isme humne basic GET ke saath DELETE implement kiya hai. Simple array methods push/filter use kiye gaye hain.
